nodes.label: Sorrow→joy → ask in Jesus’ name → overcome world

hinges.identity_□: Jesus is the victorious Son whose departure sends the Helper.
hinges.enactment_◇: He warns of expulsion, promises the Spirit’s convicting/guiding work, and speaks sorrow-to-joy.
hinges.effect_Δ: Disciples gain peace and courage amid tribulation; the world is exposed by the Spirit.
